items.title: Document the coordinate source on the figure
items.avoid: Axis labels reading only "Dimension 1" / "Dimension 2" with no method name.
items.prefer: Titles and axis labels naming PCA, t-SNE, or UMAP plus key hyperparameters and random seed.
items.why: Readers must know whether distances are linear projections or non-linear layouts before interpreting gaps.

items.title: Match visual encoding to metadata type
items.avoid: Using a rainbow colormap for unordered categorical labels.
items.prefer: Discrete palettes for categories; sequential/diverging colormaps for continuous scores; separate legend entries.
items.why: False ordering from continuous colormaps misleads viewers about categorical structure.
items.example: `scatter(..., c=df['language'].astype('category').cat.codes, cmap='tab10')` not `c=y, cmap='jet'` for nominal labels.

items.title: Handle large-n responsibly
items.avoid: Single full-opacity scatter of millions of points.
items.prefer: Stratified subsample for overview, hexbin for density, tooltips in interactive tools for drill-down.
items.why: Readable density patterns prevent false conclusions from ink saturation.
items.example: Plot 5k stratified samples for the paper figure; link to interactive notebook for full data.

items.title: Pair visuals with error-aware coloring
items.avoid: Showing only true labels when evaluating a classifier.
items.prefer: Add prediction-error markers or faceted true vs predicted views during model debugging.
items.why: Spatial error patterns explain confusion-matrix cells and guide data collection.
items.example: Black rings on misclassified points while fill color remains true label—see confusion matrix for class-pair counts.
